CIHI_RESOURCE_USE_INTENSITY.Trend note: Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) no longer exists. Data from Queen Elizabeth II Hospital (Alta.) will now be attributed to Grande Prairie Regional Hospital (Alta.), Mackenzie Place (Alta.) and Queen Elizabeth II Hospital Ambulatory Care Centre (Alta.) as of December 04, 2021.

NATIONAL_SPENDING_COMPARE.source: CIHI NHEX 2025 Table O.1 (non-forecast rows); bedsPer100k from CIHI indicator 877 + NHEX population; costPerStandardStay from CIHI indicator 823 (CSHS)
NATIONAL_SPENDING_COMPARE.sourceVintage: 2025 calendar year (NHEX 2025 Table O.1 latest non-forecast year; GDP share not sourced)

ALBERTA_ACTIVITY_VOLUME_TREND.source: CIHI NHEX 2025 Table O.1 Alberta total health expenditure only
ALBERTA_ACTIVITY_VOLUME_TREND.sourceVintage: Fiscal years 1975-1976 to 2025-2026 (NHEX 2025 Table O.1; forecast-marked rows excluded where present; activity/volume fields not sourced)

PHYSICIAN_SPECIALTY_BILLING.source: Open Alberta AHCIP Statistical Supplement (combined workbook)
PHYSICIAN_SPECIALTY_BILLING.sourceVintage: 2021-22 service year (AHCIP Statistical Supplement, Tables 2.3, 2.12 A/B/D, 2.14)
PHYSICIAN_SPECIALTY_BILLING.verification: Physician count, average gross payment, and service counts are joined from AHCIP Statistical Supplement Tables 2.12 A/B/D (latest service year). Total payments sum FFS+BCP+RRNP+MEDR from Table 2.3. servicesPerPatient = services / registered persons from Table 2.14 when present; otherwise null (Pathology/Radiology excluded by source — never zero-filled).

ALBERTA_USE_OF_FUNDS.source: CIHI NHEX 2025 full data tables (Series D1, Alberta sheet, non-forecast years)
ALBERTA_USE_OF_FUNDS.sourceVintage: Fiscal year 2023-2024 (NHEX 2025 Series D1 Alberta use of funds, latest non-forecast year)

CIHI_RESOURCE_USE_INTENSITY.source: CIHI indicator 818, Average Acute Care Resource Use Intensity

CIHI_SPENDING_PER_PERSON.source: CIHI indicator 879, Age-Adjusted Public Spending per Person

PROVINCIAL_SPENDING_TREND.source: CIHI NHEX 2025 Table O.1 (public + private per-capita by province/year)
PROVINCIAL_SPENDING_TREND.sourceVintage: Calendar years 1975 to 2025 (NHEX 2025 Table O.1 non-forecast rows)

PROVINCIAL_USE_OF_FUNDS.source: CIHI NHEX 2025 Table O.1 public-sector use of funds by province
PROVINCIAL_USE_OF_FUNDS.sourceVintage: 2025 calendar year (public sector shares of provincial public total)
